prompt: Single-frame photorealistic editorial image of a real-world evening rooftop gathering, physically plausible and natural. In the foreground, one person stands alone near the edge of the crowd, holding a drink, while across the space the visible social structure forms several dense conversational clusters centered around especially magnetic, socially connected individuals. The lonely viewer-positioned figure is surrounded mostly by people who themselves appear to be at the center of larger circles of connection. The composition should make it feel subtly impossible that everyone else seems more connected than the observer. No text, no numbers, no charts, no symbols, no equations, no diagrams, no surreal floating elements. Realistic photography, natural body language, magazine feature style, emotionally uncanny but understated, strong depth and composition, no generic AI glow.
visual_logic: A socially peripheral person sees mostly highly connected people at the centers of dense groups, making everyone else appear more connected than they are.
